issues.description: Action type is 'KO' but card text says 'Give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters −5 cost'. This should be 'PowerBoost' with a negative value, not KO.

maxCost is 3, but card text specifies '−5 cost'. The maxCost filter is incorrect—it should filter by cost, not limit the effect to cards costing 3 or less. The action itself (PowerBoost) applies the −5 modifier; maxCost is not the right property here.
Missing duration. Text says 'during this turn' which requires duration:'DuringYourTurn'.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Main] Give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters −5 cost during this turn.
